feedback: Love the OTT bundle included with recharge.
terrible data balance on this operator, v disappointed, especially in delhi
Plans way too expensive for this service.
Internet speed blazing fast at 150 Mbps in Raipur.
Support is okay. Average experience overall.

The SIM activation process has been an absolute nightmare taking over hours with no clear communication about delays. I submitted all documents but the SIM remains dead while customer support gives contradictory information about timelines. Being without phone service this long is unacceptable in the modern era.

intrenet painfully slow at 20 Mbps in Hubli and data balance of 1GB depletes too fast. The data validity of only 28 days adds insult to injury. Slow speeds insufficient data and short validity create a triple negative exprnce. Other users in my area report similar experiences so this is clearly not an isolated case.

Billing is standard and functional. Charges match my plan most months and bills arrive on time. Occasionally there is a small discrepancy that auto-corrects. Nothing to specifically praise or complain about. Just normal telecom billing. Other users in my area report similar experiences so this is clearly not an isolated case.
Only 28 days validity is too short.
Call quality terrible. Constant drops and echo.

The plan validity of only 56 days is deliberately designed to extract extra money by forcing more recharges annually than necessary. This shorter cycle means I effectively pay more per year than competitors who offer standard monthly validity at similar per-recharge pricing. Anti-consumer tactic.

The netwrk covrage in Visakhapatnam has been consistently terrible for months with multiple dead zones in my daily commute. Signal drops randomly several times each day and takes minutes to reconnect. Despite multiple complaints nothing has improved. This level of unreliability is unacceptable for any modern telecom operator.

The daily data balance of 5GB is laughably insufficient for any normal smartphone user in today's world. It runs out within a couple of hours of standard usage leaving me throttled to unusable speeds for the rest of the day. The allocation needs to at least double to be practical.
Plans overpriced for what they offer.
Only 30 days validity is too short.

Average plan standard pricing and typical value. Nothing about the Rs 499 recharge stands out in any direction. The entire economic proposition is neutral delivering exactly market standard returns for market standard investment. I would appreciate if the operator actually invested in improving this aspect of their service.

internet speed has been pathetically slow in secunderabad at brly 500 mbps during peak hours making even basic browsing painful, streaming is impossible and video calls constantly freeze, the gap between advertised speeds and reality is enormous and feels like deliberate false advertising to attract customers
covrage average speed neutral and calls okay.
Best bang for buck among all operators.
Roaming good SIM activated fast and app helped.

Average plan standard pricing and typical value. Nothing about the Rs 599 recharge stands out in any direction. The entire economic proposition is neutral delivering exactly market standard returns for market standard investment. After using this service for several months I can confidently say this is my honest assessment.

good affordable pricing at rs 349 but network coverage in warangal is poor and customer support is unhelpful about the issue, cheap plan but the money saved is offset by the frustration of unreliable service and absent support, other users in my ra report similar experiences so this is clearly not an isolated case

5g speeds r impressive at 150 mbps in chennai but the recharge plan required for 5g access is far too expensive for what it offers, great technology but terrible plan economics make 5g feel like a luxury tax rather than a standard upgrade

SIM activation took standard time. Not particularly fast or slow just the average industry exprnce. Documents accepted without issues and connection went live within expected timeframe. Nothing remarkable about the process either way. I hope the operator takes custmer feedback seriously and works on improving this going forward.
terrible billing on this operator, v disappointed, especially in indore

Plan great with OTT good speed and excellent value at Rs 799. The gap between what is advertised and what is actually delivered is quite noticeable here. Other users in my locality report the same experience consistently. The situation has not improved despite waiting weeks.
Standard app and average data balance.

Data validity of 56 days is standard across the industry. No strong feelings about it as it is comparable to what all operators offer. Neither particularly generous nor frustratingly short. Just normal plan duration. The gap between what is advertised and what is actually delivered is quite noticeable here.
Data validity good but internet speed disappointing.
Standard streaming bundle. Nothing remarkable.

The 5G experience in Dehradun has been genuinely transformative for my mobile usage. Getting consistent 10 Mbps speeds with low latency has made cloud gaming streaming and video calls seamless. The coverage has expanded significantly and the overall 5G quality matches the marketing promises.
HD voice calls work perfectly every time.

5G speeds excellent in Raipur and data balance of 2GB daily lasts well for most tasks. But the recharge plan pricing at Rs 349 is too steep for what should be standard technology access. Fast and sufficient but overpriced. After using this service for several months I can confidently say this is my honest assessment.

intrenet speed has been pathetically slow in Kanpur at barely 150 Mbps during peak hours making even basic browsing painful. Streaming is impossible and video calls constantly freeze. The daily data balance of 1GB has been more than adequate for my usage patterns including video calls streaming and browsing. I rarely exhaust the allocation before the day resets and the real-time tracking in the app helps me manage consumption effectively throughout each day.

Internet speed in Ahmedabad has been consistently fast at 150 Mbps throughout my subscription. Whether I am streaming downloading or on video calls the bandwidth is always sufficient. Even during peak evening hours the speed remains stable which is exactly what I need for reliable remote work.

Internet speed has been pathetically slow in Noida at barely 200 Mbps during peak hours making even basic browsing painful. Streaming is impossible and video calls constantly freeze. The gap between advertised speeds and reality is enormous and feels like deliberate false advertising to attract customers.

Call quality has become unbearable on this network with every conversation plagued by echo delays and random drops. I rely on phone calls for work and this poor quality is damaging my professional reputation. Multiple handset changes prove it is clearly a network issue not a device problem.

the sim activation process was remarkably smooth and fast in jodhpur, from document submission to active connection evthing completed within hours, the entire flow was well organized modern and hassle-free, this is exactly how telecom onboarding should work in the digital age

custmer supprt is completely dysfunctional. I have called multiple times about the same issue and each agent asks me to repeat everything from scratch with zero continuity. I hope the operator takes customer feedback seriously and works on improving this going forward.

SIM activation was painfully slow taking hours in Wakad but once active the internet speed has been impressive. Terrible onboarding experience followed by excellent ongoing service quality. First impression bad but daily experience good. I hope the operator takes customer feedback seriously and works on improving this going forward.
5G speeds are phenomenal in Indiranagar.

Roaming in Singapore was excellent with seamless connectivity but the mobile app was useless abroad for managing my pack showing incorrect balance and crashing frequently. Good physical service but poor digital exprnce while traveling. The gap between what is advertised and what is actually delivered is quite noticeable here.
Dead zones everywhere. covrage is pathetic in Marathahalli.

the mobile app is genuinely excellent for daily account management, recharges happen instantly balance checks r real-time and the interface is clean and intuitive, even complex tasks like plan changes and complaint registration work smoothly, the best telecom app experience i have had in trivandrum
Affordable pricing but internet speed is slow in Whitefield.

The app is average. It does basic account management tasks without crashing but the interface is not particularly impressive or modern. Features load at acceptable speed. A standard telecom app that meets minimum expectations in Thane. Compared to what competitors offer at similar price points this exprnce falls short significantly.
Good plan fair pricing and excellent value in Mysore.
Average daily data allocation. Just okay in Bangalore.
Good plan fair pricing and excellent value in Raipur.

The netwrk coverage in Mumbai has been consistently excellent for my entire subscription. Whether indoors commuting or in commercial areas I always have strong reliable signal without any dead zones. The infrastructure investment is clearly visible and the coverage qlity sets this operator apart from competitors I have tried.
